title: dryopteris laterepens
intro: Dryopteris laterepens, also known as the Late-Flowering Male Fern, is a species of fern native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Dryopteris laterepens include relieving coughs, soothing irritated lungs, and promoting overall respiratory well-being. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies to combat various health conditions.
